# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "appServicePlanName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '-plan')]"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 24
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "cosmosAccountName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "storageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_LRS"
    },
    "appInsightsName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '-ai')]"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "functionApiVersion": "2022-03-01",
    "roleAssignmentApiVersion": "2022-04-01",
    "storageApiVersion": "2023-01-01",
    "keyVaultApiVersion": "2023-02-01",
    "sqlApiVersion": "2023-05-01-preview",
    "cosmosApiVersion": "2023-04-15",
    "insightsApiVersion": "2020-02-02"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('storageApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('storageSku')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Insights/components",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('insightsApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('appInsightsName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "web",
      "properties": {
        "Application_Type": "web"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('functionApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "functionapp",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Y1",
        "tier": "Dynamic"
      },
      "properties": {
        "reserved": false
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('functionApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "functionapp",
      "identity": {
        "type": "SystemAssigned"
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', parameters('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "httpsOnly": true,
        "siteConfig": {
          "appSettings": [
            {
              "name": "AzureWebJobsStorage",
              "value": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), variables('storageApiVersion')).keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage)]"
            },
            {
              "name": "FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION",
              "value": "~4"
            },
            {
              "name": "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME",
              "value": "dotnet-isolated"
            },
            {
              "name": "WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE",
              "value": "1"
            },
            {
              "name": "APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY",
              "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName')), variables('insightsApiVersion')).InstrumentationKey]"
            },
            {
              "name": "APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING",
              "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName')), variables('insightsApiVersion')).ConnectionString]"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[guid(subscription().id, resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'StorageBlobDataContributor')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('functionApiVersion'), 'Full').identity.principalId]",
        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",

        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"

        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },

        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]",

        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[guid(subscription().id, resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'KeyVaultSecretsUser')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '4633458b-17de-408a-b874-0445c86b69e6')]",

        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[guid(subscription().id, resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'SQLDBContributor')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '9b7fa17d-e63e-47b0-bb0a-15c516ac86ec')]",

        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[guid(subscription().id, resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'CosmosDBAccountReaderRole')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosAccountName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'fbdf93bf-df7d-467e-a4d2-9458aa1360c8')]",

        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "[variables('roleAssignmentApiVersion')]",
      "name": "[guid(subscription().id, resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), 'CosmosDBOperator')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosAccountName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '230815da-be43-4aae-9cb4-875f7bd000aa')]",

        "principalType": "ServicePrincipal"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "functionPrincipalId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), variables('functionApiVersion'), 'Full').identity.principalId]"
    },
    "functionAppResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
    }
  }
